sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Experience.css'; const experiences = [ { company: 'Business International Group', location: 'Muscat, Oman', role: 'Commercial Executive', period: 'Sep 2025 – Present', badge: 'Current', desc: 'Responsible for managing the end-to-end order processing cycle — from order booking and purchase order processing to generating sales invoices, ensuring seamless coordination between sales, finance, and logistics.', responsibilities: [ 'Receive and process customer purchase orders in SAP ERP; validate pricing, discounts, and delivery terms', 'Plan and oversee inbound shipments (air, sea, land); liaise with freight forwarders and customs brokers', 'Prepare and issue accurate sales invoices; ensure correct tax, compliance, and milestone billing entries', 'Act as point of contact for order status, invoice queries, and delivery schedules', 'Maintain updated records of orders, deliveries, and invoices; generate periodic sales reports', ], skills: ['SAP ERP', 'Logistics', 'Invoicing', 'MS Excel', 'Compliance'], }, { company: 'Amphenol Automotive', location: 'India', role: 'Sr Officer – Sales / Customer Support', period: 'Oct 2024 – Sep 2025', badge: '', desc: 'Understanding customer needs and driving success by managing OEM and Tier-1 automotive clients across major global brands.', responsibilities: [ 'Handled OEM & Tier-1 customers: Tata Motors, Mahindra & Mahindra, Hyundai Mobis, VE Commercial Vehicles, Autoliv', 'Managed sales pipeline, customer queries, and order fulfillment with high satisfaction metrics', 'Coordinated cross-functional teams to ensure on-time delivery and quality compliance', ], skills: ['OEM Management', 'Customer Support', 'Sales', 'Automotive'], }, { company: 'Ravel Electronics Private Limited', location: 'India', role: 'Executive & Coordinator – Sales', period: 'Apr 2023 – Oct 2024', badge: '🏆 Best Performer 2023–24', desc: 'Awarded Best Performer of the Year 2023–2024. Managed key clients and distributors across industrial and government sectors.', responsibilities: [ 'Handled clients: Hindustan Agency, Global Electrocom, RDSO, Cavitak', 'Performed Order Acceptance, Validation, Entry, Status tracking, and Replacement Orders', 'Followed established processes to accept or reject purchase orders based on contractual requirements', 'Identified and communicated errors to sales teams; interfaced with stakeholders to resolve problems', ], skills: ['Order Management', 'Sales Coordination', 'ERP', 'Client Handling'], }, { company: 'Amphenol Omniconnect India', location: 'India', role: 'Executive – Customer Support / Sales', period: 'Jul 2022 – Apr 2023', badge: '', desc: 'Managed global and internal orders for telecommunications and renewable energy clients across all regions.', responsibilities: [ 'Customers: Nokia, Fimer, Ericsson, Siemens Gamesa', 'Performed end-to-end order acceptance, validation, entry, and status management', 'Managed global orders for all regions in ERP systems, ensuring SLA compliance', 'Followed up on missing information to fulfill customer requests in a timely manner', 'Entered order and billing data accurately into ERP and Order Management System (OMS)', ], skills: ['Global Orders', 'OMS', 'ERP', 'SLA Management', 'Telecom'], }, { company: 'Yazaki India Private Limited', location: 'India', role: 'Associate – Customer Support / Sales', period: 'Jul 2020 – Jun 2022', badge: '', desc: 'Managed automotive OEM sales and customer support for leading vehicle manufacturers.', responsibilities: [ 'Customers: Ford, Renault Nissan, Ashok Leyland', 'Responsible for sales orders and sale agreements for automotive OEM clients', 'Prepared FOC SO, Scrap SO, Service SO, debit and credit notes', 'Payment follow-ups from customers and support to finance team', 'Prepared daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly reports analyzing business growth potential', ], skills: ['Automotive OEM', 'SAP', 'Reporting', 'Finance Coordination'], }, ]; export default function Experience() { const [active, setActive] = useState(0); const exp = experiences[active]; return (
Career Path

); }
